<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/json-api.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-json-api-bash-1140" location="lines:1140-1147" -->
```bash
   # 1. Get admin token for the participant
   USER_ADMIN_TOKEN=$(curl -fsS "http://keycloak.localhost:8082/realms/AppUser/protocol/openid-connect/token" \
     -H 'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded' \
     -d 'client_id=app-user-validator' \
     -d 'client_secret=6m12QyyGl81d9nABWQXMycZdXho6ejEX' \
     -d 'grant_type=client_credentials' \
     -d 'scope=openid' | jq -r .access_token)

```
